data.body:
The most sold TV resolution is 4K. Not 8K.

Why? Humans can't distinguish pixels beyond 4K.

Same applies to AI in enterprises:

"Good enough" delivered faster beats "perfect" slower.

This changes everything for designers.

https://youtu.be/DJxPsWgtEdc

#DesignStrategy #AI
